name: Hipcamp Outdoor Hospitality API
what_it_does: Hipcamp REST API for outdoor hospitality and unique camping marketplace platform. Enables AI agents to manage listing availability and pricing, process booking requests, retrieve guest profiles and stay history, manage listing content and amenities, access review and rating data, handle host payouts, and integrate Hipcamp data with farm and land management systems.
use_cases: Managing camping and glamping site availability from outdoor hospitality agents
Processing booking requests and guest communications from host management agents
Updating listing content and amenities from property management agents
Retrieving review data and guest feedback from reputation management agents
not_for: Traditional campground chains without unique/private land access focus
Hotel and indoor lodging without outdoor camping experience focus
Commercial RV parks without private land and glamping experiences
best_when: A landowner, farm, or rancher listing unique camping experiences on Hipcamp wants AI agents to automate availability management, guest communication, and booking workflows.
avoid_when: PRIVACY: Guest personal data and booking information requires careful handling. Land access and liability considerations vary by state — automated guest management must comply with applicable recreational use laws.

auth.notes: Hipcamp uses OAuth 2.0 for partner API access. Host/property-level credentials. Partner program required. API primarily for hospitality management platforms integrating with Hipcamp marketplace.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free for hosts to list; Hipcamp takes commission on bookings
pricing.paid_tiers: Commission-based model on bookings; no monthly fees for hosts
pricing.notes: San Francisco company, founded 2013. Leading private land camping marketplace. Focus on farms, ranches, vineyards, and unique outdoor experiences. 14 million+ campers. Airbnb-style model for outdoor hospitality.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; documented in partner portal

known_agent_gotchas: PRIVACY: Guest personal and camping booking data requires careful handling
No public MCP server — REST API with OAuth2 partner program
No webhooks — requires polling for booking updates
Partner program required — not available for direct host API integration
US-centric marketplace — limited for international outdoor hospitality
Recreational use liability varies by state — automated guest management must account for legal context
agent_readiness.security_notes: Guest personal and booking data. PCI-DSS. OAuth2. US data residency. Partner program required. Commission-based marketplace.

security_score_components.security_notes: Guest booking and personal data. PCI-DSS. OAuth2. US data residency. Commission marketplace model.
